scientific_note: Event-locked EEG classifiers predict dataset task labels under controlled conditions; they are not general mind-reading models.

warnings: Fixture mode is deterministic EEG-like data, not external public EEG.
inspection.scientific_note: EEG inspection reports file metadata and annotations; it is not clinical review.

classifier_shadow.scientific_note: Classifier shadow inference predicts event labels and does not adapt the corridor.

comparison.interpretation: Heuristic output is a cognitive proxy summary. The learned classifier predicts dataset task labels from event-locked EEG epochs. Neither is mind reading.

validation.scientific_note: Hardware validation assesses timestamp consistency, channel mapping, and proxy SQI. It is not clinical validation.
